code:
import io
import string
import list

fn flush(_ nums: List<Int>, _ cur: String) -> List<Int>
  if string.is_empty(cur)
    nums
  else
    match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(v)
      list.push(nums, v)
    when None
      nums
    end
  end
end

fn parse_line(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = ""
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(c)
      if c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 13
        nums = flush(nums, cur)
        cur = ""
      else
        cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(c)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  flush(nums, cur)
end

fn render_reversed(_ nums: List<Int>) -> String
  let len = nums.len()
  mut out = ""
  mut j = len - 1
  mut first = true
  while j >= 0
    match nums.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      if first
        out = "#{v}"
        first = false
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j - 1
  end
  out
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  let nums = parse_line(line)
  println(render_reversed(nums))
when None
  println("")
end
